title: Classical Reservoir Computing: Foundations
description: Understand the fundamentals of reservoir computing, a powerful paradigm for temporal information processing that forms the foundation for quantum reservoir computing.
learningObjectives: Understand the reservoir computing paradigm and its advantages
Explain the role of the reservoir, input, and readout layers
Define key properties: echo state property and fading memory
Implement a basic echo state network
Apply reservoir computing to time series prediction
Compare reservoir computing with traditional RNNs
